The '''''Pestage''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
In response to a number of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attacks in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] against various [[hydrocarbon]] processing facilities, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] decided to subjugate the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kheedar]] to protect its hydrocarbon resources. The ''Pestage'' was dispatched to Kheedar, and its [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] proceeded to invade the planet.<ref name="GG9" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
